Oracle NoSQL Database
Version 5.4.20 10-March-2026
  1. oracle.nosql.driver.iam

Uses of Package
oracle.nosql.driver.iam

Packages that use oracle.nosql.driver.iam
Package
Description
oracle.nosql.driver.iam
This package contains the public API for managing security for the Oracle NoSQL Database Cloud using Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Identity and Access Management (IAM).
  • Classes in oracle.nosql.driver.iam used by oracle.nosql.driver.iam
    Class
    Description
    AuthenticationProfileProvider
    Internal use only
    InstancePrincipalsProvider
    Internal use only
    InstancePrincipalsProvider.InstancePrincipalsProviderBuilder
    Cloud service only.
    OCIConfigFileReader.OCIConfigFile
    Cloud service only.
    ResourcePrincipalProvider
     
    ResourcePrincipalProvider.ResourcePrincipalProviderBuilder
    Cloud service only.
    ResourcePrincipalV3Provider
     
    ResourcePrincipalV3Provider.ResourcePrincipalV3ProviderBuilder
    Builder for ResourcePrincipalProviderBuilder.
    RptPathProvider
    This path provider makes sure the behavior happens with the correct fallback.
    SignatureProvider
    Cloud service only.
